title: fix: From<Option<T>> for Patch<T> maps None to Keep, not Clear
description:
## Problem
From<Option<T>> for Patch<T> maps None → Patch::Keep (no change) rather than Patch::Clear (explicit null). Callers who do None.into() expecting to clear a field will silently get no-op behavior instead. The conversion is documented but the mismatch with Option's natural semantics is a latent footgun.

## Solution
Either: (a) remove the From<Option<T>> impl and force callers to write Patch::Keep or Patch::Clear explicitly, or (b) add a dedicated Patch::from_option_clear(opt) constructor and remove the From impl, making the distinction hard to miss.

## Acceptance
- Surprising From<Option<T>> → Keep mapping is eliminated or made impossible to reach accidentally
- Existing code updated to use explicit Patch variants where needed
- Tests verify the intended semantics
